spec.objective: Author images/codex-subagent/Dockerfile — a multi-stage build that compiles the static cmd/codex-subagent binary in Stage 1 (golang:1.26-alpine, CGO_ENABLED=0) and produces a runtime image in Stage 2 (node:22-slim base with git installed, pinned @openai/codex npm CLI, Go binary copied, UID 1000, ENTRYPOINT /usr/local/bin/codex-subagent). Mirrors images/claude-subagent/Dockerfile structure exactly. Canonical image ref: ghcr.io/jsquirrelz/tide-codex-subagent. Add Makefile docker-build-codex-subagent and docker-push-codex-subagent targets using IMAGE_TAG convention, wired into the umbrella docker-build and docker-push goals. Dockerfile must build clean from repo root: docker build -t ghcr.io/jsquirrelz/tide-codex-subagent:test -f images/codex-subagent/Dockerfile .
